fields.label: Collision model: Origin point
fields.description: Compile the single-point collision model.

fields.label: Collision model: Triangle
fields.description: Compile the triangle collision model.

fields.label: Collision model: Bounding box
fields.description: Compile the bounding-box collision model.

fields.label: Enable slope collision
fields.description: Enable slope collision

fields.label: Max behavior slots
fields.description: Number of behavior definition slots available (each slot uses 6 bytes of RAM)

fields.label: Component: Gravity
fields.description: Compile the gravity component. Uncheck to save ROM if no behavior uses gravity.

fields.label: Topdown Z axis
fields.description: Enable actor Z position/velocity fields and apply gravity to Z instead of Y (topdown jump/height simulation).

fields.label: Component: Move horizontally
fields.description: Compile horizontal movement and wall collision. Uncheck to save ROM if no behavior moves horizontally.

fields.label: Component: Move vertically
fields.description: Compile vertical movement and floor/ceiling collision. Required for gravity to have a visible effect.

fields.label: Component: Turn at ledges
fields.description: Compile smart ledge detection. Requires 'Move horizontally'.

fields.label: Component: Turn at walls
fields.description: Compile velocity reversal on wall hits. When disabled, actors stop at walls instead.

fields.label: Component: Bounce on floor/ceiling
fields.description: Compile bounce physics (includes 32-bit math). When disabled, actors stop on floor/ceiling instead. Requires 'Move vertically'.

fields.label: Component: Parent actors / moving platforms
fields.description: Compile parent actor inheritance: any actor with a parent set inherits the parent's per-frame movement (tile-collision checked) and still runs its own behavior physics. Also compiles the 'Moving platform' behavior component, which automatically parents/unparents the actors it touches. Uncheck to save ROM if nothing uses parenting or platforms.

fields.label: Component: Collide with other actors
fields.description: Compile actor-vs-actor collision (blocks/turns on contact with other collidable actors; the player is already handled by the engine). Uncheck to save ROM if no behavior uses it.

fields.label: Component: Animation handling
fields.description: Compile automatic animation (face direction, idle, jump). Uncheck if you handle animations yourself.

fields.label: VM: Wait for collision
fields.description: Compile vm_wait_for_collision waitable helper.

fields.label: VM motion: Chase actor
fields.description: Compile vm_actor_chase_actor.

fields.label: VM motion: Move to position by velocity
fields.description: Compile vm_actor_move_to_pos_by_velocity.

fields.label: VM motion: Crawl step
fields.description: Compile vm_actor_crawl_step.

fields.label: Event actor index
fields.description: Actor index for the current dynamic actor event.

fields.label: Event behavior index
fields.description: Behavior index for the current dynamic actor event.

fields.label: Event state
fields.description: State for the current dynamic actor event.

fields.label: Event tile collision
fields.description: Tile collision value for the current dynamic actor event.

fields.label: Event tile x
fields.description: Tile x coordinate for the current dynamic actor event.

fields.label: Event tile y
fields.description: Tile y coordinate for the current dynamic actor event.
